gmb.description: FranchiseKI is an AI-powered franchise consulting platform. We help prospective franchise buyers research, evaluate, and select franchise concepts using verified FDD data. Free consultation — we're paid by franchisors, not buyers. Explore 3,200+ brands with FranchiseScore ratings at mapki.franchiseki.com.

yelp.description: Franchise consulting powered by AI. We match investors with franchise opportunities using verified FDD data and proprietary FranchiseScore ratings (0-100). Free consultation — paid by franchisors. Portfolio includes 150+ vetted brands. Research 3,200+ franchises at mapki.franchiseki.com.

bbb.description: AI-powered franchise consulting and marketplace. Serving prospective franchise buyers nationwide with data-driven concept matching, FDD education, and franchisee validation coaching. No buyer fees — compensation from franchisors only.
